headline: PulteGroup PHM Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Ryan Marshall: I made the following statement to the senior leaders of PulteGroup, Inc.'s homebuilding and financial services operations.  In a period that saw every aspect of our consumers' lives impacted by domestic and global events, our discipline, focus, and proven business platform allowed us to deliver another quarter of strong business performance.  Financially, our $3.3 billion in home sale revenues, 24.4% gross margins, and lower share count all contributed to driving earnings of $1.79 per share.

headline: Assessing PulteGroup (PHM) Valuation After Q1 Earnings Pressure And Expanded Buyback Authorization
summary: PulteGroup (PHM) shares are in focus after first quarter results showed revenue of US$3.41b and net income of US$347m, both lower than a year earlier, set against a backdrop of housing affordability and rate pressures. See our latest analysis for PulteGroup. The stock has been resilient around US$127.56, with a 7.52% 1 month share price return and a 27.23% 1 year total shareholder return. These measures point to momentum holding up despite the softer quarterly earnings. If earnings headlines...

headline: PulteGroup earnings miss estimates as margins compress
summary: Investing.com- On Thursday, PulteGroup Inc. (NYSE:PHM) reported first quarter earnings of $1.79 per share, missing analyst estimates of $1.82, as the homebuilder navigated challenging market conditions with higher incentives and compressed margins. Revenue of $3.3 billion fell short of the $3.39 billion consensus and declined 12% YoY from $3.7 billion.

headline: PulteGroup (NYSE:PHM) Posts Q1 CY2026 Sales In Line With Estimates But Stock Drops
summary: Homebuilding company PulteGroup (NYSE:PHM) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, but sales fell by 12.4% year on year to $3.41 billion. Its GAAP profit of $1.79 per share was 1.1% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: PulteGroup, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
summary: ATLANTA, April 23, 2026--PulteGroup, Inc. (NYSE: PHM) announced today financial results for its first quarter ended March 31, 2026. For the quarter, the Company reported net income of $347 million, or $1.79 per share. In the comparable prior year period, the Company reported net income of $523 million, or $2.57 per share.

headline: PulteGroup Announces $1.5 Billion Increase to Share Repurchase Authorization
summary: ATLANTA, April 23, 2026--PulteGroup, Inc. (NYSE: PHM) announced today that its Board of Directors has approved a $1.5 billion increase to the Company’s share repurchase authorization. This increase brings the Company’s current share repurchase authorization to $2.1 billion.
